name: archivum
description: Organize your browser tabs by age. Automatically group tabs into age-based groups (Week+, Month+, Quarter+, etc.) and keep your workspace organized.

scripts.install:chromium: wxt prepare && npx playwright install chromium
scripts.test: npm run test:unit && npm run test:playwright:chromium
scripts.test:playwright: rm -rf .output/chrome-mv3 .output/firefox-mv3 && npm run build:test && npx playwright test -c playwright.config.ts
scripts.test:playwright:chromium: rm -rf .output/chrome-mv3 && npm run build:test:chromium && npx playwright test -c playwright.config.ts --project chrome-mv3
scripts.test:playwright:firefox: rm -rf .output/firefox-mv3 && npm run build:test:firefox && npx playwright test -c playwright.config.ts --project firefox-mv3
scripts.test:playwright:debug: rm -rf .output/chrome-mv3 && npm run build:test:chromium && npx playwright test -c playwright.config.ts --project chrome-mv3 --debug
scripts.test:playwright:ui: rm -rf .output/chrome-mv3 && npm run build:test:chromium && npx playwright test -c playwright.config.ts --ui --project chrome-mv3
scripts.build: npm run type-check && cross-env DEV_FEATURES=false wxt build -b chrome --mv3 && cross-env DEV_FEATURES=false wxt build -b firefox --mv3 && cross-env DEV_FEATURES=false wxt build -b edge --mv3
scripts.build:test: cross-env DEV_FEATURES=true wxt build -b chrome --mv3 && cross-env DEV_FEATURES=true wxt build -b firefox --mv3
scripts.release: npm run type-check && npm run lint && npm run test:unit && npm run build && npx wxt zip -b chrome --mv3 && npx wxt zip -b firefox --mv3 && npx web-ext lint --source-dir .output/firefox-mv3 --verbose && npx wxt zip -b edge --mv3 && echo '✅ All packages ready - Firefox manifest validated via web-ext lint' && ls -lh .output/archivum-*.zip 2>/dev/null | grep -v sources | tail -3
scripts.ci: npm run type-check && npm run test:unit && npm run test:playwright:chromium && npm run build && npx wxt zip -b chrome --mv3 && npx wxt zip -b firefox --mv3 && npx wxt zip -b edge --mv3
